cues.text: Welcome. This tutorial covers the daily RP Rental workflow now migrated from manual steps into Odoo.
cues.title: Intro

translations.en: Welcome. This tutorial covers the daily RP Rental workflow now migrated from manual steps into Odoo.
translations.es: Welcome. This tutorial covers the daily RP Rental workflow now migrated from manual steps into Odoo.

cues.text: Odoo is the source of truth for customers, equipment, availability, contracts, deliveries, returns, quality checks, and billing.
cues.title: What Changed

translations.en: Odoo is the source of truth for customers, equipment, availability, contracts, deliveries, returns, quality checks, and billing.
translations.es: Odoo is the source of truth for customers, equipment, availability, contracts, deliveries, returns, quality checks, and billing.

cues.text: If it is not in Odoo, it did not happen. Keep every step updated as you work.
cues.title: Golden Rule

translations.en: If it is not in Odoo, it did not happen. Keep every step updated as you work.
translations.es: If it is not in Odoo, it did not happen. Keep every step updated as you work.

cues.text: Start from the main Apps menu. Use the global search bar to quickly find Customers, Rentals, and Products.
cues.title: Navigation Basics

translations.en: Start from the main Apps menu. Use the global search bar to quickly find Customers, Rentals, and Products.
translations.es: Start from the main Apps menu. Use the global search bar to quickly find Customers, Rentals, and Products.

cues.text: Your role controls what you can do. If a button is missing, request access instead of working around the process.
cues.title: Roles and Access

translations.en: Your role controls what you can do. If a button is missing, request access instead of working around the process.
translations.es: Your role controls what you can do. If a button is missing, request access instead of working around the process.

cues.text: Before creating a quote, confirm the customer exists and the billing and delivery contacts are correct.
cues.title: Customers

translations.en: Before creating a quote, confirm the customer exists and the billing and delivery contacts are correct.
translations.es: Before creating a quote, confirm the customer exists and the billing and delivery contacts are correct.

cues.text: Create new customers only when needed. Add phone, email, addresses, and set any payment terms required by the business.
cues.title: Create or Update a Customer

translations.en: Create new customers only when needed. Add phone, email, addresses, and set any payment terms required by the business.
translations.es: Create new customers only when needed. Add phone, email, addresses, and set any payment terms required by the business.

cues.text: Rental products represent what you sell. Rental assets represent the physical units that get delivered and returned.
cues.title: Products and Assets

translations.en: Rental products represent what you sell. Rental assets represent the physical units that get delivered and returned.
translations.es: Rental products represent what you sell. Rental assets represent the physical units that get delivered and returned.

cues.text: Use the imported catalog and product codes to search quickly. Confirm the item is marked as rentable and available.
cues.title: Finding Equipment Fast

translations.en: Use the imported catalog and product codes to search quickly. Confirm the item is marked as rentable and available.
translations.es: Use the imported catalog and product codes to search quickly. Confirm the item is marked as rentable and available.

cues.text: Always confirm availability for the requested dates before promising equipment to the customer.
cues.title: Availability Check

translations.en: Always confirm availability for the requested dates before promising equipment to the customer.
translations.es: Always confirm availability for the requested dates before promising equipment to the customer.

cues.text: Create a new quotation for the customer, then add the rental products and set the rental start and end dates.
cues.title: Create a Rental Quote

translations.en: Create a new quotation for the customer, then add the rental products and set the rental start and end dates.
translations.es: Create a new quotation for the customer, then add the rental products and set the rental start and end dates.

cues.text: Set the rental period before validating pricing. Dates drive availability and the correct rental price calculation.
cues.title: Rental Dates First

translations.en: Set the rental period before validating pricing. Dates drive availability and the correct rental price calculation.
translations.es: Set the rental period before validating pricing. Dates drive availability and the correct rental price calculation.

cues.text: Pricing follows the imported rate matrix. Confirm daily, weekly, and monthly cycles align with the agreed commercial terms.
cues.title: Pricing and Rate Logic

translations.en: Pricing follows the imported rate matrix. Confirm daily, weekly, and monthly cycles align with the agreed commercial terms.
translations.es: Pricing follows the imported rate matrix. Confirm daily, weekly, and monthly cycles align with the agreed commercial terms.

cues.text: When the customer approves, confirm the quotation. This becomes the rental contract and triggers the operational workflow.
cues.title: Confirm the Contract

translations.en: When the customer approves, confirm the quotation. This becomes the rental contract and triggers the operational workflow.
translations.es: When the customer approves, confirm the quotation. This becomes the rental contract and triggers the operational workflow.

cues.text: Review the delivery order, ensure the correct warehouse and destination, and prepare assets for dispatch.
cues.title: Delivery Preparation

translations.en: Review the delivery order, ensure the correct warehouse and destination, and prepare assets for dispatch.
translations.es: Review the delivery order, ensure the correct warehouse and destination, and prepare assets for dispatch.

cues.text: Validate the delivery in Odoo when the equipment leaves. Record any required evidence and confirm the on-site location.
cues.title: Validate Delivery

translations.en: Validate the delivery in Odoo when the equipment leaves. Record any required evidence and confirm the on-site location.
translations.es: Validate the delivery in Odoo when the equipment leaves. Record any required evidence and confirm the on-site location.

cues.text: If dates or quantities change, update the contract immediately. Do not track changes only in chat or email.
cues.title: Extensions and Changes

translations.en: If dates or quantities change, update the contract immediately. Do not track changes only in chat or email.
translations.es: If dates or quantities change, update the contract immediately. Do not track changes only in chat or email.

cues.text: If an asset is replaced, record the exchange so traceability and billing remain correct.
cues.title: Exchange Contracts

translations.en: If an asset is replaced, record the exchange so traceability and billing remain correct.
translations.es: If an asset is replaced, record the exchange so traceability and billing remain correct.

cues.text: For partial returns, process the return picking and adjust the contract lines so invoicing stays accurate.
cues.title: Partial Returns

translations.en: For partial returns, process the return picking and adjust the contract lines so invoicing stays accurate.
translations.es: For partial returns, process the return picking and adjust the contract lines so invoicing stays accurate.

cues.text: When all equipment returns, validate the return picking. This is the handoff into quality control.
cues.title: Full Return

translations.en: When all equipment returns, validate the return picking. This is the handoff into quality control.
translations.es: When all equipment returns, validate the return picking. This is the handoff into quality control.

cues.text: Run the Rental Return inspection. Capture condition notes and issues so maintenance and billing decisions are supported.
cues.title: Return Quality Check

translations.en: Run the Rental Return inspection. Capture condition notes and issues so maintenance and billing decisions are supported.
translations.es: Run the Rental Return inspection. Capture condition notes and issues so maintenance and billing decisions are supported.

cues.text: Before sending equipment out again, complete the Ready-To-Rent inspection. This prevents avoidable failures in the field.
cues.title: Ready-To-Rent Check

translations.en: Before sending equipment out again, complete the Ready-To-Rent inspection. This prevents avoidable failures in the field.
translations.es: Before sending equipment out again, complete the Ready-To-Rent inspection. This prevents avoidable failures in the field.

cues.text: Billing is driven by the contract and time. Generate invoices based on the agreed billing cadence.
cues.title: Billing Cycle Overview

translations.en: Billing is driven by the contract and time. Generate invoices based on the agreed billing cadence.
translations.es: Billing is driven by the contract and time. Generate invoices based on the agreed billing cadence.

cues.text: If your process uses the 3-3-3 rule, apply it consistently: daily, weekly, and monthly billing logic must match the contract.
cues.title: 3-3-3 Rule (If Applicable)

translations.en: If your process uses the 3-3-3 rule, apply it consistently: daily, weekly, and monthly billing logic must match the contract.
translations.es: If your process uses the 3-3-3 rule, apply it consistently: daily, weekly, and monthly billing logic must match the contract.

cues.text: Create the invoice from the rental order, review line items and taxes, then send it to the customer from Odoo.
cues.title: Create and Send Invoices

translations.en: Create the invoice from the rental order, review line items and taxes, then send it to the customer from Odoo.
translations.es: Create the invoice from the rental order, review line items and taxes, then send it to the customer from Odoo.

cues.text: When payment is received, register it and reconcile. Keep Accounting accurate so reporting stays reliable.
cues.title: Payments and Reconciliation

translations.en: When payment is received, register it and reconcile. Keep Accounting accurate so reporting stays reliable.
translations.es: When payment is received, register it and reconcile. Keep Accounting accurate so reporting stays reliable.

cues.text: Use reports to monitor open rentals, asset utilization, overdue returns, invoices due, and quality backlog.
cues.title: Operational Reporting

translations.en: Use reports to monitor open rentals, asset utilization, overdue returns, invoices due, and quality backlog.
translations.es: Use reports to monitor open rentals, asset utilization, overdue returns, invoices due, and quality backlog.

cues.text: Once the rental is fully returned, quality is completed, and invoicing is done, close the loop and archive evidence.
cues.title: Closeout

translations.en: Once the rental is fully returned, quality is completed, and invoicing is done, close the loop and archive evidence.
translations.es: Once the rental is fully returned, quality is completed, and invoicing is done, close the loop and archive evidence.

cues.text: You are ready to run the daily workflow in Odoo using your real catalog, assets, and rates.
cues.title: End

translations.en: You are ready to run the daily workflow in Odoo using your real catalog, assets, and rates.
translations.es: You are ready to run the daily workflow in Odoo using your real catalog, assets, and rates.

flow_name: RP Rental daily workflow (manual to Odoo migration)
